archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury + Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Premium B2B)
design_principles: Precision and Trust: Use stark contrasts, fine 1px borders, and geometric alignment to evoke medical precision.
Luxury Medical: Deep obsidian backgrounds with champagne gold accents instead of standard medical blue/green.
Bento Data Density: Use dense, structured grids for the 13 division cards to allow easy scanning.
Optical Clarity: Glassmorphism headers with sharp inner strokes to separate from the dark background.
Contextual Emotion: Every design decision maps to trust, authority, and high-end engineering.

rules: Never use bold for main H1, use font-light or font-medium for a premium editorial look.
Overlines/Subtitles must be uppercase, tiny, and widely spaced.
Import fonts via Google Fonts in the global CSS or HTML.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12 for major containers, p-6 for bento cards.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room) for catalog grids. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Cards use flat background (#171717), 1px solid border (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color becomes rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.5) (Gold).

components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70, border-b border-white/10. Sticky top positioning with z-50.
components.hero_section: Dark luxury hero. Image overlay max bg-black/40 to let the abstract tech background shine. Left aligned text. Hero height around 85vh.
components.division_cards: 13 bento cards for medical divisions. Top section: icon and count. Bottom: Title. Use grid span logic to avoid equal squares if possible (e.g., make top 2 categories col-span-2).
components.trust_badges: Monochrome rendering of logos where possible (ISO, CDSCO, Meril Authorized), or placed on solid #1C1C1E pill shapes with 1px border. Muted teal accents (#2DD4BF) can be used here.
components.buttons: Primary CTA (WhatsApp/Catalog): bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold rounded-sm hover:bg-[#F2C94C] transition-colors. Secondary: border border-white/20 text-white rounded-sm hover:bg-white/5.
components.footer: Massive padding (py-24). Background #000000. Large 'AGILE ORTHO' text at text-[8vw] at the bottom with text-white/5.
components.district_coverage: Use the abstract glowing map background. Display the 33 districts as a dense technical list or grid.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All cards and buttons must have clear hover transitions. Change border colors or add subtle text highlighting.
interactions_and_motion.animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered entrance animations of the division cards (staggerChildren).

images.description: Abstract dark luxury background with gold/teal geometric lines for precision medical technology.
Macro photography of titanium orthopedic implant. Use in Ortho Division card or About section.
Glowing wireframe map for the District Coverage section.
Sterile operating room. Good for background in About Us or Trust section.
Advanced laboratory machinery. Good for Diagnostics division.

media.icons: Use lucide-react (default). For technical luxury, use very thin stroke widths (e.g., strokeWidth={1.5}).

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files not .tsx files, so write all React components in .js/.jsx syntax without TypeScript types.
Inject the custom font imports (Outfit, Manrope) into index.css.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (obsidian, charcoal, primary gold, secondary muted teal) and the font families.
Apply this theme universally: homepage, catalog pages, product details, and map it into the admin panel for consistency.
Replace all existing generic light mode cards with the Dark Premium Bento Grid 'Control Room' style.
Ensure all text against dark backgrounds meets APCA/WCAG contrast (no gray-on-gray).
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='whatsapp-cta', data-testid='division-card-ortho').
